/usr/bin/g++ -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Test/main.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Windowing/source/uWindow.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Core/source/UniversalUI.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Core/source/uApplication.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Windowing/source/uWindowManager.o -o UniversalUI  -lGL -lX11 -lXext
